query: extreme overexposure blown out highlights white sky photograph
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — overexposed/blown highlights, silhouettes against white sky, washed-out high-key minimalism

response.objective_caption: A tightly cropped portrait of a young child with light-colored hair framing the face, eyes gazing toward the viewer, rendered in pale monochromatic tones where the hair and background form a continuous bright field around the visible eyes and subtle facial contours.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A tightly cropped portrait of a young child with light hair and eyes gazing toward the viewer, exhibiting extreme overexposure that blows out the background and hair to pure white, severely muted and faded desaturated tones, and oppressively low contrast that crushes midtones so facial features and hair lack tonal separation from the bright surroundings, leaving only the eyes with distinct definition.
